issues.sample: TWO ISSUES: THE SMALL PORTABLE AIR PUMP THAT CAME WITH THE CAR WOULD BLOW THE FUSE TO THE 12V CIGARETTE LIGHTER.  AFTER A NEW FUSE IS PUT IN,  THIS WOULD HAPPEN ON ABOUT EVERY THIRD OR FOURTH TIME OF USING OF THE PUMP.  I HAVE REPLACED ABOUT 5 FUSES ALREADY.      THE SECOND ISSUE

narrative.headline: What 2020 Audi Q7 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 25 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (40% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
